content:
{
  "dialogues": [
    {
      "title": "問尺寸",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "店員",
          "text": "你好，請問你需要什麼？",
          "pinyin": "Nǐ hǎo, qǐng wèn nǐ xūyào shénme?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ni3 hao3, qing3 wen4 ni3 xu1yao4 shen2me?",
          "translation_en": "Hello, how can I help you?",
          "translation_ko": "안녕하세요, 무엇을 도와드릴까요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "你好，我想看一件外套。",
          "pinyin": "Nǐ hǎo, wǒ xiǎng kàn yī jiàn wàitào.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ni3 hao3, wo3 xiang3 kan4 yi1 jian4 wai4tao4.",
          "translation_en": "Hello, I'd like to look at a jacket.",
          "translation_ko": "안녕하세요, 외투 하나를 보고 싶어요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "店員",
          "text": "好的，請問你要什麼顏色？",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo de, qǐng wèn nǐ yào shénme yánsè?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hao3 de, qing3 wen4 ni3 yao4 shen2me yan2se4?",
          "translation_en": "Okay, what color would you like?",
          "translation_ko": "네, 어떤 색상을 원하시나요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "我想要黑色的，有中號嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Wǒ xiǎng yào hēisè de, yǒu zhōng hào ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Wo3 xiang3 yao4 hei1se4 de, you3 zhong1 hao4 ma?",
          "translation_en": "I want a black one. Do you have a medium size?",
          "translation_ko": "검은색을 원하는데, 중간 사이즈가 있나요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "店員",
          "text": "有，這件是中號的，你可以試穿看看。",
          "pinyin": "Yǒu, zhè jiàn shì zhōng hào de, nǐ kěyǐ shìchuān kàn kàn.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "You3, zhe4 jian4 shi4 zhong1 hao4 de, ni3 ke3yi3 shi4chuan1 kan4 kan4.",
          "translation_en": "Yes, this one is medium. You can try it on.",
          "translation_ko": "네, 이건 중간 사이즈입니다. 입어보실 수 있어요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "好，謝謝。試衣間在哪裡？",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo, xièxiè. Shìyījiān zài nǎlǐ?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hao3, xie4xie4. Shi4yi1jian1 zai4 na3li3?",
          "translation_en": "Okay, thank you. Where is the fitting room?",
          "translation_ko": "네, 감사합니다. 탈의실이 어디에 있나요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "店員",
          "text": "在前面左邊，請跟我來。",
          "pinyin": "Zài qiánmiàn zuǒbiān, qǐng gēn wǒ lái.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Zai4 qian2mian4 zuo3bian1, qing3 gen1 wo3 lai2.",
          "translation_en": "It's on the left ahead. Please follow me.",
          "translation_ko": "앞쪽 왼쪽에 있습니다. 저를 따라오세요."
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "What color does the customer want?",
          "question_ko": "손님은 어떤 색상을 원합니까?",
          "options_en": ["Black", "White", "Red"],
          "options_ko": ["검은색", "흰색", "빨간색"],
          "correct_index": 0
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat each sentence after the speaker, focusing on the pronunciation of colors and sizes.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Pretend you are a customer asking for a jacket in a different color and size. Say your request in Chinese."
    },
    {
      "title": "太貴了",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "這件上衣很好看，請問多少錢？",
          "pinyin": "Zhè jiàn shàngyī hěn hǎokàn, qǐng wèn duōshǎo qián?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Zhe4 jian4 shang4yi1 hen3 hao3kan4, qing3 wen4 duo1shao3 qian2?",
          "translation_en": "This top is very nice. How much is it?",
          "translation_ko": "이 상의가 아주 예쁘네요. 얼마인가요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "店員",
          "text": "這件是原價一千兩百塊，現在打八折，只要九百六十塊。",
          "pinyin": "Zhè jiàn shì yuánjià yīqiān liǎngbǎi kuài, xiànzài dǎ bā zhé, zhǐyào jiǔbǎi liùshí kuài.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Zhe4 jian4 shi4 yuan2jia4 yi1qian1 liang3bai3 kuai4, xian4zai4 da3 ba1 zhe2, zhi3yao4 jiu3bai3 liu4shi2 kuai4.",
          "translation_en": "This one is originally 1,200 dollars. Now it's 20% off, only 960 dollars.",
          "translation_ko": "이건 원래 1,200원인데, 지금 20% 할인해서 960원입니다."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "九百六十塊？太貴了！可以便宜一點嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Jiǔbǎi liùshí kuài? Tài guì le! Kěyǐ piányí yīdiǎn ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Jiu3bai3 liu4shi2 kuai4? Tai4 gui4 le! Ke3yi3 pian2yi2 yi1dian3 ma?",
          "translation_en": "960 dollars? That's too expensive! Can you make it a bit cheaper?",
          "translation_ko": "960원이요? 너무 비싸요! 조금 깎아주실 수 있나요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "店員",
          "text": "不好意思，這是特價品，不能再打折了。",
          "pinyin": "Bù hǎoyìsi, zhè shì tèjià pǐn, bù néng zài dǎzhé le.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Bu4 hao3yi4si, zhe4 shi4 te4jia4 pin3, bu4 neng2 zai4 da3zhe2 le.",
          "translation_en": "I'm sorry, this is a sale item. We can't give any further discount.",
          "translation_ko": "죄송합니다. 이건 특가 상품이라 더 할인이 안 됩니다."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "好吧，那我再看看別的。謝謝。",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo ba, nà wǒ zài kàn kàn bié de. Xièxiè.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hao3 ba, na4 wo3 zai4 kan4 kan4 bie2 de. Xie4xie4.",
          "translation_en": "Alright, then I'll look at other things. Thank you.",
          "translation_ko": "그래요, 그럼 다른 걸 좀 더 볼게요. 감사합니다."
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "Why didn't the customer buy the top?",
          "question_ko": "손님은 왜 상의를 사지 않았습니까?",
          "options_en": ["It was too expensive", "It was too small", "It was the wrong color"],
          "options_ko": ["너무 비쌌다", "너무 작았다", "색상이 맞지 않았다"],
          "correct_index": 0
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat each sentence, paying attention to the tone of expressing 'too expensive' and asking for a discount.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Pretend you are a customer who thinks a pair of pants is too expensive. Ask the clerk for a discount in Chinese."
    },
    {
      "title": "試穿",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "你好，我想試穿這件裙子。",
          "pinyin": "Nǐ hǎo, wǒ xiǎng shìchuān zhè jiàn qúnzi.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ni3 hao3, wo3 xiang3 shi4chuan1 zhe4 jian4 qun2zi.",
          "translation_en": "Hello, I'd like to try on this skirt.",
          "translation_ko": "안녕하세요, 이 치마를 입어보고 싶어요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "店員",
          "text": "好的，請問你要什麼尺寸？",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo de, qǐng wèn nǐ yào shénme chǐcùn?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hao3 de, qing3 wen4 ni3 yao4 shen2me chi3cun4?",
          "translation_en": "Okay, what size would you like?",
          "translation_ko": "네, 어떤 사이즈를 원하시나요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "我要小號的，有白色的嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Wǒ yào xiǎo hào de, yǒu báisè de ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Wo3 yao4 xiao3 hao4 de, you3 bai2se4 de ma?",
          "translation_en": "I want a small size. Do you have it in white?",
          "translation_ko": "작은 사이즈를 원하는데, 흰색이 있나요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "店員",
          "text": "有，這件是小號白色的。試衣間在後面右邊。",
          "pinyin": "Yǒu, zhè jiàn shì xiǎo hào báisè de. Shìyījiān zài hòumiàn yòubiān.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "You3, zhe4 jian4 shi4 xiao3 hao4 bai2se4 de. Shi4yi1jian1 zai4 hou4mian4 you4bian1.",
          "translation_en": "Yes, this one is small and white. The fitting room is on the right in the back.",
          "translation_ko": "네, 이건 작은 사이즈 흰색입니다. 탈의실은 뒤쪽 오른쪽에 있어요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "謝謝。我試穿一下。",
          "pinyin": "Xièxiè. Wǒ shìchuān yīxià.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Xie4xie4. Wo3 shi4chuan1 yi1xia4.",
          "translation_en": "Thank you. I'll try it on.",
          "translation_ko": "감사합니다. 잠깐 입어볼게요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "店員",
          "text": "沒問題，慢慢來。",
          "pinyin": "Méi wèntí, mànmàn lái.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Mei2 wen4ti2, man4man4 lai2.",
          "translation_en": "No problem, take your time.",
          "translation_ko": "천천히 하세요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "這件裙子很舒服，也很合身。我要買這件。",
          "pinyin": "Zhè jiàn qúnzi hěn shūfú, yě hěn héshēn. Wǒ yào mǎi zhè jiàn.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Zhe4 jian4 qun2zi hen3 shu1fu2, ye3 hen3 he2shen1. Wo3 yao4 mai3 zhe4 jian4.",
          "translation_en": "This skirt is very comfortable and fits well. I'll buy this one.",
          "translation_ko": "이 치마가 아주 편하고 잘 맞아요. 이걸 살게요."
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "What did the customer try on?",
          "question_ko": "손님은 무엇을 입어보았습니까?",
          "options_en": ["A skirt", "A jacket", "A pair of pants"],
          "options_ko": ["치마", "외투", "바지"],
          "correct_index": 0
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat each sentence, focusing on the phrases for trying on clothes and describing fit.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Pretend you are a customer who tried on a blue jacket. Tell the clerk it fits well and you want to buy it."
    }
  ]
}
